task_completion.description: Create a 3D text object with the content 'GALAXY'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D text object spelling 'GALAXY' is visible in the Blender 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Extrude the 3D text so it has depth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GALAXY' text in the viewport has visible thickness or depth, indicating the geometry has been extruded rather than being a flat 2D plane.

task_completion.description: Create a lattice object with a resolution of at least 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Lattice object (a wireframe grid box) is visible in the viewport or Outliner, and it has internal subdivisions (at least 3 control points along at least one axis).

task_completion.description: Visibly warp the text using the lattice in a non-destructive way
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GALAXY' text is visibly bent, stretched, or warped. The lattice control points are moved from their default rectangular shape, and a Lattice modifier is likely visible in the Properties panel for the text object.
The Blender window title bar displays 'lattice_warp.blend' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to the directory '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to complete the task rather than a terminal script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's menus, viewport, and properties panels rather than a terminal window executing a Python script.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Blender application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Blender 3D interface is visible, including the 3D viewport, Outliner, and Properties editor.

integrity.description: The text and lattice are genuine 3D objects created in the scene
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner panel lists a Text object and a Lattice object, confirming they are procedurally generated 3D elements and not imported 2D images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected text is exactly 'GALAXY'. The output file must be saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/lattice_warp.blend'. The lattice must have at least 3 control points on at least one axis (U, V, or W). Deformation is successful if lattice points are moved from their default positions with a cumulative displacement greater than 0.1 units, visibly warping the text.
